MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, D. M. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-12-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

DEAN HEDANI, PROTEM JDG; C/C FOR SETTLMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A STIP JUDGMNT IS READ INTO THE RECORD IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF AS FOLLOWS: DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 149 6TH ST. ROOM 19, S.F. AND TO PAY $1154.00 IN BACK RENT. EXEC STAYED TO MIDNIGHT 2-NOV-93. IF DEFT VACATES, PLTF WAIVES $1154.00 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. IF DEFT FAILTS TO VACATE, PLTF IS ENTITLED TO EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT IMMEDIATELY. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AND DAMAGES. JOHN MALONE, PARALEGAL FOR PLTF TO PREPARE STIP JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF OCT-12-1993, OFF CALENDAR FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARISH, JUDY FARISH, BILL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 149 SIXTH STREET, ROOM 19, S.F., STAYED UNTIL NOV-02-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE PRIOR TO MIDNIGHT 2-NOV-93, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT IN AMT OF $1154.00. IF NOT, PLTF SHALL HAVE IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION & BACK RENT OF $1154.00. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR OWN COSTS. DEFTS WAIVE ANY CLAIMS AGAINST PLTF FOR DAMAGES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
